title: Updater Fixer
description: Little trick to be able to update to future versions without needing to corrupt the world or lose your progress.
body:
# Updater Fixer

Updater Fixer addresses one of Minecraft’s persistent challenges: maintaining compatibility across different versions and mods. This mod introduces a unique parallel dimension where players can build their base and store their loot, enabling a simple way to reset the Overworld without losing progress.

## ✅Features
1. **Parallel Dimension:** Provides a safe space for players to build their home and store important items, preserving achievements and progress.
   
1. **Easy Version and Mod Portability:** Players can seamlessly update or modify their Minecraft environment by simply deleting files in the **.minecraft/saves/world/region** folder to reset the Overworld.
   
1. **Complete Overworld Flexibility:** With Updater Fixer, you can add or remove mods, and switch versions without worrying about losing your base or loot.

## 📖Why Use Updater Fixer?
This mod is perfect for players seeking a flexible way to preserve their progress while switching between Minecraft versions or installing new mods. By storing key items in a separate dimension, players can reset the Overworld without hassle, creating a highly customizable gaming experience.
